name: Notes From Province
short_description: Dive into a deep Open World that rewards exploration. Solve clever puzzles with lateral thinking, and engage in unique, story-driven boss battles. Then take a break. Furnish your home, fish a little, and chill with your eccentric neighbors.
detailed_description:
Need help?

Stuck on a puzzle? Stumped by a boss?

No worries! We have a welcoming, helpful Discord community available to answer questions, or just chat about the game.


About the Game

Dive into a deep Open World that rewards exploration, solve clever puzzles with lateral thinking, and engage in unique, story-driven boss battles. Then take a break. Furnish your home, fish a little, and chill with your eccentric neighbors.

Kyme's searching for a fresh start in the city of Province. Will he find it among the eccentric residents and their whimsical adventures? Or will he get lost chasing his personal villain, a grand thief capable of stealing the blue from the sky, the voice of a singer, and even the very memory of what he stole, leaving you with nothing but an empty feeling?

Features

  • Open world No dead ends, only new things to see and treasure to find

  • Character driven story Even the battles have a story to tell

  • 7 characters Each with distinct styles and roles, swap-able mid combat

  • Equipment based customization Abilities and passives come from equipment that can be freely swapped to redefine characters

  • Enemies worth reacting to Each encounter has a plan to crush you unless you spot the weakness and counter

  • Decorate and expand your house Earn bonus awards based on your furniture arrangement

  • NPCs with lives Each villager has their own daily agenda, situational dialog, and a story to tell the more you get to know them

  • So much to do Crafting, cooking, fishing, dancing, finding a strange rat-loving man living in a hole under your neighbor's house
